arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the API Gateway domain name.

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the certificate that is used to validate the domain name.

certificate_name.description: The name of the certificate associated with the domain name.

certificate_upload_date.description: The date when the certificate was uploaded.

cloudfront_domain_name.description: The domain name assigned by CloudFront to the API Gateway.

cloudfront_zone_id.description: The CloudFront zone ID for the distribution associated with the domain name.

endpoint_configuration.description: The endpoint configuration of the domain name, specifying the types of endpoints.

id.description: The ID of the API Gateway domain name.

regional_certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the regional certificate used for the domain name.

regional_certificate_name.description: The name of the regional certificate associated with the domain name.

regional_domain_name.description: The regional domain name for the API Gateway.

regional_zone_id.description: The regional zone ID for the domain name.

security_policy.description: The security policy used for the domain name, indicating the TLS version.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the domain name.
